FINAL_RESULT:
  UUID: d4ce682e-6c3d-40ac-996b-0915b4eed1b0
  PREDICTED_SMILES: CC(C)C(NC(=O)OC(C)(C)C)C(=O)NC(C)C(=O)OC(C)(C)C
  CONFIDENCE: 0.95
  REASON_BRIEF: The 1H NMR shows two tert‑butyl groups, two amide NH doublets, an isopropyl side chain (Val) and an alanine methyl doublet; 13C NMR confirms three carbonyls (two amides/ester and one carbamate) and the HRMS matches C17H33N2O5+, consistent with Boc‑Val‑Ala‑OtBu.
